items.title: 30+ Updates per Second per Account: Uber Scales Ledger Processing with Batching
items.summaryShort: 30+ Updates per Second per Account: Uber Scales Ledger Processing with Batching. Uber introduced a high-throughput financial ledger processing system designed to handle hot account write contention at scale.

items.title: How a Culture of Data-Driven Conversations Can Support Platform Engineering
items.summaryShort: How a Culture of Data-Driven Conversations Can Support Platform Engineering. To provide SRE as a service, a team built a center of excellence, introducing Federated SREs and roles like production manager and technical tribe lead.

items.title: Presentation: Architecting a Centralized Platform for Data Deletion at Netflix
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Architecting a Centralized Platform for Data Deletion at Netflix. The speakers discuss the architectural challenges of executing safe data deletion across distributed datastores.

items.title: Article: Architectural Change Cases: A Practical Tool for Evolutionary Architectures
items.summaryShort: Article: Architectural Change Cases: A Practical Tool for Evolutionary Architectures. Architectural change cases extend architecture decision record (ADR) thinking by evaluating how decisions may evolve over time.

items.title: AWS Replaces Fat-Tree Data Center Networks with Random Graph Theory, Cutting Routers by 69%
items.summaryShort: AWS Replaces Fat-Tree Data Center Networks with Random Graph Theory, Cutting Routers by 69%. AWS disclosed that Resilient Network Graphs, a flat network architecture based on quasi-random graph theory, is now the default for most new data c

items.title: Founders Fund launches game show starring Sam Altman, Palmer Luckey, and other tech elites
items.summaryShort: Founders Fund launches game show starring Sam Altman, Palmer Luckey, and other tech elites. The debut episode, moderated by Founders Fund chief marketing officer Mike Solana, included a star-studded cast of current tech luminaries.

items.title: Ahead of its IPO, Anthropic's Daniela Amodei shrugs off doubts about AI's returns
items.summaryShort: Ahead of its IPO, Anthropic's Daniela Amodei shrugs off doubts about AI's returns. Anthropic has been growing at a breakneck pace.

items.title: Airbnb's Brian Chesky plans to launch a new AI lab
items.summaryShort: Airbnb's Brian Chesky plans to launch a new AI lab. The Airbnb CEO said last year it hasn't struck an LLM partnership because existing products weren't quite ready.
